queries.question: For each tour operator, describe the activities that they offer.
queries.sql: select adventure_tour_operators.name , activities.description from Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities join Activities on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id = Activities.id join Adventure_Tour_Operators on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id = Adventure_Tour_Operators.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?adventure_tour_operators_activities a :Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities .
  ?activities a :Activities .
  ?adventure_tour_operators_activities p:hasActivities ?activities .
  ?adventure_tour_operators a :Adventure_Tour_Operators .
  ?adventure_tour_operators_activities p:hasAdventure_Tour_Operators ?adventure_tour_operators .
  ?adventure_tour_operators p:name ?name .
  ?activities p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me activities each tour operator organises.
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.activity_name  from Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities join Activities on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id = Activities.id join Adventure_Tour_Operators on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id = Adventure_Tour_Operators.id   GROUP BY Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Adventure_Tour_Operators)

queries.question: Show me activities each tour operator organises.
queries.sql: select adventure_tour_operators.name , activities.activity_name from Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities join Activities on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id = Activities.id join Adventure_Tour_Operators on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id = Adventure_Tour_Operators.id

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>

  ?adventure_tour_operators p:name ?name .
  ?activities p:activity_name ?activity_name .
}

queries.question: which activity names and descriptions are associated with each adventure tour operator?
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.activity_name, Activities.description  from Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities join Activities on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id = Activities.id join Adventure_Tour_Operators on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id = Adventure_Tour_Operators.id   GROUP BY Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Adventure_Tour_Operators)

queries.question: which activity names and descriptions are associated with each adventure tour operator?
queries.sql: select adventure_tour_operators.name , activities.activity_name , activities.description from Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities join Activities on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id = Activities.id join Adventure_Tour_Operators on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id = Adventure_Tour_Operators.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?activity_name ?description WHERE {
  ?adventure_tour_operators_activities a :Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities .
  ?activities a :Activities .
  ?adventure_tour_operators_activities p:hasActivities ?activities .
  ?adventure_tour_operators a :Adventure_Tour_Operators .
  ?adventure_tour_operators_activities p:hasAdventure_Tour_Operators ?adventure_tour_operators .
  ?adventure_tour_operators p:name ?name .
  ?activities p:activity_name ?activity_name .
  ?activities p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Describe the activities that each tour operator offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.description  from Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities join Activities on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id = Activities.id join Adventure_Tour_Operators on Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id = Adventure_Tour_Operators.id   GROUP BY Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.activity_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Adventure_Tour_Operators_Activities.adventure_tour_operator_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Adventure_Tour_Operators)
